zh.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Craon於1278年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易可拉奧。她於1295年7月22日與Olivier III de Clisson在法國安喬可拉奧結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1350年7月30日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯享年72歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Craon于1278年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易可拉奧。她于1295年7月22日与Olivier III de Clisson在法国安喬可拉奧结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1350年7月30日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯享年72岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Craon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Craine
meanings: Manx: shortened form of Gaelic Mac (Giolla) Ciaráin ‘son of (the devotee of) Ciarán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of Gaelic ciar, Manx keeir ‘black’. The place Ballacraine on the Isle of Man means ‘Craine's farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Craon was born in 1278, in Craon, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. She married Olivier III de Clisson on 22 July 1295, in Craon, Anjou, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 30 July 1350, in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 72, and was buried in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Craon est née en 1278, à Craon, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. Elle a épousé Olivier III de Clisson le 22 juillet 1295, à Craon, Anjou, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 30 juillet 1350, à Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Craon wurde 1278 in Craon, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren. Sie hat am 22. Juli 1295 in Craon, Anjou, Frankreich Olivier III de Clisson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 30. Juli 1350 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Craon è nata il nel 1278 nel Craon, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Lei sposato Olivier III de Clisson il 22 luglio 1295, nel Craon, Anjou, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 luglio 1350, nel Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Craonは1278年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアークラオンで生まれた。1295年7月22日にフランスアンジョウクラオンでOlivier III de Clissonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1350年7月30日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーアンジャーズで72歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーアンジャーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Craon(은)는 1278년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 크라에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1295년 7월 22일 프랑스 앤조우 크라에서 Olivier III de Clisson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 7월 30일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Craon nasceu em 1278, em Craon, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França. Ela casou-se com Olivier III de Clisson em 22 de julho de 1295, em Craon, Anjou, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 30 de julho de 1350, em Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire: ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Craon родилась в 1278 г. в местности краон, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Olivier III de Clisson 22 июля 1295 г. в местности краон, анджоу, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 30 июля 1350 г. в местности ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Craon nació en 1278, en Craon, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Se casó con Olivier III de Clisson el 22 de julio de 1295, en Craon, Anjou, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de julio de 1350, en Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
